data.title: 国际服半周年庆典预约
data.summary: Sensei, the pre-registration for Blue Archive's 0.5-Year Anniversary Celebration has begun! Pre-regi
data.body:
Sensei, the pre-registration for Blue Archive's 0.5-Year Anniversary Celebration has begun!
Pre-register and get your boarding ticket for the cruise ship and see what C&C is up to!

⬇️Pre-register⬇️
